allow: Bash(python -c "from jinja2 import Environment, FileSystemLoader; env = Environment\(loader=FileSystemLoader\('templates'\)\); env.get_template\('treinos.html'\); print\('OK'\)")
Bash(grep -n "^[a-z_]*\\s*=\\s*\\[\\]$\\|^[a-z_]*\\s*=\\s*{}\\s*$\\|^global " "G:/My Drive/Projeto Workout App/App Flask HTMX 2/app_flask.py")

PowerShell($killed = $false; if \(Test-Path "server.pid"\) { $p = Get-Content "server.pid" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Matei PID $p \(server.pid\)"; $killed = $true } catch {} } }; $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Matei PID $_ \(porta 5000\)"; $killed = $true } catch {} } }; if \(-not $killed\) { Write-Output "Nenhum processo na porta 5000" }; if \(Test-Path "server.pid"\) { Remove-Item "server.pid" -Force }; $check = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output \("Porta 5000 agora: " + $\(if \($check\) { "AINDA EM USO" } else { "livre" }\)\))
